rejected.reason: Signal fires on both Yes and No sides of same market when legendary traders are split (78% of markets). Paired signals contribute exactly 50% by construction. 7-30 day horizon below random baseline (42.9%). Signal adds no predictive value over market price as currently defined.
rejected.do_not_retry_without: Pre-registered STR-001b hypothesis with exclusive convergence filter (3+ on one side, <3 on other). quant-research-agent owns this. Oscar must approve hypothesis before backtest-agent retests.
